destinations.evidence: Normal EVM construction uses RitualEvm with RitualPrecompiles installed.
destinations.snippet:
type Evm<DB: Database, I: Inspector<AsyncEthEvmContext<DB>, EthInterpreter>> = RitualEvm<DB, I, RitualPrecompiles>;
...
RitualEvm::new(async_context, NoOpInspector::default())
    .with_precompiles(RitualPrecompiles::new())

destinations.evidence: Inspector-backed EVM construction also installs RitualPrecompiles before enabling inspection.
The executor builder wires RitualEvmFactory into the block executor provider, making the precompile set part of normal node execution.

equivalence_argument: RitualEvmFactory installs RitualPrecompiles for both ordinary and inspector-backed EVMs, and RitualExecutorBuilder wires that factory into node execution.
rationale: The primary commit replaces the local wrapper executor with an EthEvmConfig parameterized by RitualEvmFactory. RitualEvmFactory creates EthEvm instances whose inner revm context calls with_precompiles(RitualPrecompiles::new()), and the builder wires that factory into BasicBlockExecutorProvider. The commit subject explicitly says to use our precompiles. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Every EVM constructed by the Ritual node executor configuration for normal execution or inspector-backed execution must include RitualPrecompiles, so transactions executed by the node can call Ritual precompile addresses through the block executor path.
suggested_falsification_tests: Configure a Ritual node executor with this builder, execute a block containing a transaction or contract call to a known Ritual precompile address such as the ONNX precompile address, and assert the call is handled by RitualPrecompiles in both the ordinary execution path and an inspector-enabled execution path. The test should fail if the executor is constructed with plain Ethereum precompiles or no Ritual precompile set.
summary: Nodebuilder executor-installed EVMs include Ritual precompiles in normal and inspector paths.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Execute a transaction against a known Ritual precompile through both normal and inspector-backed node execution and assert RitualPrecompiles handles the call.
title: Node executor installs Ritual precompiles
